title: hieracium ramosissimum subsp. scariolaceum
intro: Hieracium ramosissimum subsp. scariolaceum, also known as Hieracium scariolaceum, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, offering potential health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and protecting against cell damage. In herbal preparations, Hieracium scariolaceum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
